rule_metadata.name: apt_lagulon_trojan_pdb
rule_metadata.description: Rule to detect trojan Lagulon based on PDB
rule_metadata.author: Marc Rivero | McAfee ATR Team

rules.rule_text:
rule apt_lagulon_trojan_pdb
{
	meta:
		description = "Rule to detect trojan Lagulon based on PDB"
		author = "Marc Rivero | McAfee ATR Team"
		date = "2013-08-31"
		rule_version = "v1"
		malware_type = "trojan"
		malware_family = "Trojan:W32/lagulon"
		actor_type = "Apt"
		actor_group = "Unknown"
		reference = "https://www.cylance.com/operation-cleaver-cylance"
		hash = "e401340020688cdd0f5051b7553815eee6bc04a5a962900883f1b3676bf1de53"

	strings:
		$pdb = "\\proj\\wndTest\\Release\\wndTest.pdb"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filesize < 50KB and any of them
}
